name: Automattic Connect at WordCamp Europe 2026
description: Networking evening presented by Automattic for Agencies during WCEU 2026. Agencies, customers, and developers come together with the teams behind Jetpack, Woo, WordPress.com, Pressable, and WordPress VIP. Each brand hosts a dedicated lounge for products, roadmaps, and real talk.
notes: Thu Jun 4, 2026 · Connect 19:00–22:00 · plac Nowy 1, 31-056 Kraków (Kazimierz). Whole team registered. Invite-only VIP Reception 18:00–19:00 for Bart, Dustin & Abdo — an intimate hour with Automattic-ecosystem leaders before doors open. Klaus attending. Overlaps the Human Made × Kinsta party (20:00, Bulwar Kurlandzki) — hop between, both riverside / Kazimierz.

items.name: Brand lounges
items.description: Jetpack, Woo, WordPress.com, Pressable, WordPress VIP

items.name: A structured but relaxed evening of conversation
